description: Police threat avoiding 'police', 'warrant', 'OTP'
transcript: Hello, this is Inspector Sharma calling regarding an active court proceeding registered against your identity. To avoid legal detention, read back the six-digit confirmation number sent to your SMS.

intel.summary: Caller claiming to be Inspector Sharma threats legal detention unless six-digit SMS confirmation code is shared.
intel.reasoning: Classic authority impersonation combined with verification code harvesting under threat of legal action.

description: Bank fraud avoiding 'OTP', 'PIN', 'password'
transcript: We noticed suspicious activity on your banking profile. Please share the numeric sequence that just arrived on your mobile screen so we can clear your account status.

intel.summary: Caller requesting numeric sequence sent to phone to clear suspicious banking activity.
intel.reasoning: Paraphrased request for OTP under pretext of banking security audit.

description: Tax threat avoiding 'income tax', 'arrest', 'UPI'
transcript: This is the central tax clearance department. A severe compliance penalty has been levied on your PAN number. You must transfer the resolution fee via mobile application before 5 PM to prevent official action.

intel.summary: Tax department impersonation demanding resolution fee payment via app under deadline threat.
intel.reasoning: Authority impersonation with artificial deadline and coercion to pay resolution fee.

description: Card security scam avoiding 'CVV', 'KYC', 'password'
transcript: I am calling from your card issuing bank. Your account services are being restricted due to pending identity verification. Kindly read out the security digits printed on the back of your card to unblock it.

suspiciousClaims: Requesting digits on back of card
intel.summary: Bank impersonator asking for security digits on back of card (CVV) to unblock restricted account.
intel.reasoning: Paraphrased CVV harvest attempt posing as identity verification.

description: Family emergency avoiding 'accident', 'hospital', 'UPI'
transcript: Auntie, I had a severe collision on the highway and the car is damaged. The other driver is holding me here until I hand over twenty thousand rupees right away. Please send it through your mobile app to this number.

intel.summary: Alleged relative claiming highway collision and detention demanding 20,000 rupees immediately.
intel.reasoning: Classic family imposter panic scam attempting urgent financial transfer.

description: Profile security avoiding 'OTP', 'bank', 'password'
transcript: Official notification from credit security division. Your profile has breached security compliance. To retain access, confirm the verification code sent to your handset.

intel.summary: Impersonator demanding handset verification code due to compliance breach.
intel.reasoning: Paraphrased verification code extraction under false compliance authority.

description: Bonus payout avoiding 'lottery', 'winner', 'UPI'
transcript: Your online investment portfolio has unlocked a mandatory bonus payout of 200,000 rupees. To claim your funds before midnight, deposit a processing tax of 5,000 rupees to our designated clearing VPA.

intel.summary: Advance fee fraud claiming 200,000 bonus payout requiring 5,000 processing fee before midnight.
intel.reasoning: Advance fee / prize fraud requesting upfront fee to unlock non-existent funds.

description: Law enforcement avoiding 'police', 'arrest', 'UPI'
transcript: Law enforcement task force calling. Your family member is in custody at the regional station. Pay the bond penalty immediately via digital transfer to secure release.

intel.summary: Law enforcement claim of family member in custody demanding immediate bond transfer.
intel.reasoning: Extortion / authority impersonation leveraging family detention panic.

description: Gradual escalation from polite courtesy call to passcode demand
chunks: Good afternoon, am I speaking with the account holder? This is a routine customer follow-up call from HDFC Bank.
We are conducting our annual customer satisfaction review and security audit of active savings accounts.
Our system indicates that your account profile has an unverified compliance flag that requires immediate attention.
To prevent your account from being frozen by midnight, please state the 6-digit passcode sent to your phone right now.

description: Casual greeting progressing to urgent money request
chunks: Hello uncle, how are you doing today? I hope everyone at home is fine.
I am traveling near Jaipur right now and ran into unexpected trouble with my car.
The garage mechanic is refusing to release the vehicle unless I clear the repair bill immediately.
Could you please send 15,000 rupees to this mobile payment number right now? I will return it as soon as I reach home.

description: Cyber crime officer escalation to fine payment demand
chunks: Namaste, this is Senior Inspector Verma calling from the cyber crime division.
We are verifying registered mobile numbers associated with a flagged financial investigation.
Your name has appeared in connection with a suspicious overseas remittance transaction.
You must clear the statutory clearance fine of 45,000 rupees immediately to stay out of legal custody.

suspiciousClaims: Name tied to overseas remittance investigation
Statutory fine required to avoid custody

description: Telecom verification progressing to SIM deactivation and OTP theft
chunks: Greetings from the Telecom Regulatory Authority customer care team.
We are performing routine network verification for all prepaid and postpaid SIM connections.
Your SIM card document registration has failed compliance checks and will be deactivated.
Share the SMS verification pin received on your handset to halt line deactivation immediately.

suspiciousClaims: SMS verification pin needed to prevent deactivation

description: Electricity department bill payment scam escalation
chunks: Hello, I am calling from the state electricity distribution office.
This is an automated reminder regarding your monthly utility service account.
Your power connection bill for last month remains unpaid on our central ledger.
Pay the pending bill amount of 2,400 rupees through UPI within 15 minutes or electricity will be disconnected.

description: Lucky draw prize progression to advance fee demand
chunks: Congratulations! You are receiving a call from the National Reward Distribution Cell.
Your mobile number was selected in the annual digital transaction lucky draw.
You have won a cash reward of 1,00,000 rupees directly credited to your bank account.
To release the winning amount, transfer a nominal registration fee of 1,999 rupees right away.

suspiciousClaims: Registration fee required to release 100k prize

description: Legitimate HDFC KYC re-verification call advising branch visit
transcript: Hello, this is HDFC Bank calling to remind you about updating your KYC. Please visit your nearest branch with your original Aadhaar and PAN card at your convenience. Do not share any OTP or PIN over phone.

intel.summary: Legitimate bank KYC reminder asking customer to visit branch and explicitly warning against sharing OTP.
intel.reasoning: Branch visit request with explicit security advice not to share credentials.

description: Real child at hospital paying with credit card (no money request)
transcript: Hi Mom, I am at the hospital counter to pay for Dad's routine health checkup. I paid using my credit card, no need to send any money.

intel.summary: Family update regarding routine health checkup payment already completed by caller.
intel.reasoning: Benign family call explicitly stating no money is needed.

description: Legitimate courier delivery agent notification
transcript: Hello, your Amazon delivery package has arrived at your building security gate. Please collect it whenever you are free.

intel.summary: Routine courier arrival notification.
intel.reasoning: Benign delivery notification.

description: Insurance premium due reminder via official app
transcript: This is ICICI Prudential Insurance. Your annual policy premium of 12,000 rupees is due next week on 28th July. You can pay online through our official website or mobile banking app.

intel.summary: Routine insurance premium due notification advising official channel payment.
intel.reasoning: Standard bill reminder directing to official portal.

description: Swiggy food delivery partner flat number check
transcript: Hello Sir, this is your Swiggy delivery partner. I am outside your apartment building. Could you confirm your flat number?

intel.summary: Food delivery partner confirming apartment number.
intel.reasoning: Benign delivery call.

description: Friend asking for dinner bill split via UPI without urgency
transcript: Hi Rahul, this is Amit. We had dinner last night and the bill was 1,200 rupees. Whenever you get time today, send your half of 600 rupees.

intel.summary: Friend asking for dinner bill split without urgency or pressure.
intel.reasoning: Non-coercive casual friend bill split.

description: Clinic dental appointment confirmation
transcript: Good morning, calling from Apollo Clinic regarding your dentist appointment scheduled for tomorrow at 4 PM. Please reply YES to confirm your slot.

intel.summary: Medical clinic appointment confirmation.
intel.reasoning: Benign appointment reminder.

description: Credit card limit upgrade via official Yono app
transcript: Hello, this is SBI Credit Card customer care. We are calling to inform you about an automatic limit upgrade available on your card. You can activate it free of cost from SBI Yono app.

intel.summary: Bank customer care advising card limit upgrade via official app.
intel.reasoning: Benign promotional message directing user to official app.

description: Car service completion pickup notification
transcript: Hi Ramesh, your car service is complete at Maruti Service Center. Total repair bill is 4,500 rupees. You can pay by card or cash when picking up your car.

intel.summary: Car service center notifying customer of completed repairs.
intel.reasoning: Benign service center payment on pickup notice.

description: DTH subscription expiry reminder via official app
transcript: Reminder from Airtel Digital TV. Your monthly subscription expires in 3 days. Recharge using Airtel Thanks app to enjoy uninterrupted services.

intel.summary: DTH subscription expiration notice directing user to official app.
intel.reasoning: Benign subscription reminder.

description: Court threat in Hindi avoiding 'police', 'warrant', 'otp'
transcript: Hum Kachehri se bol rahe hain, aapke khilaf kanooni Karwai shuru ho gayi hai. Shanti se bachne ke liye phone par aaya hua secret number bol dijiye.

intel.summary: Court impersonation threatening legal proceedings unless secret SMS number is spoken.
intel.reasoning: Hindi court authority threat extracting secret verification code.

description: SIM card block threat in Hindi avoiding 'kyc', 'otp', 'pin'
transcript: Aapka sim card band kar diya jayega. Chalu rakhne ke liye abhi jo sandesh aaya hai usme se ank batayein.

intel.summary: Hindi SIM deactivation threat requesting message digits.
intel.reasoning: Paraphrased Hindi OTP harvest under SIM block pressure.

description: Government officer extortion in Hindi avoiding 'police', 'giraftari', 'upi'
transcript: Sarkari adhikari bol rahe hain. Aapka dastaavez galat paya gaya hai. Turant dus hazar rupey is wale par bhej do nahi toh mamla bigad jayega.

intel.summary: Hindi official demanding 10,000 rupees due to document error.
intel.reasoning: Government officer impersonation demanding immediate bribe/transfer.

description: Hospital money request in Hindi avoiding 'accident', 'emergency', 'upi'
transcript: Bhaiya main hospital me phasa hoon, doctor aage kaam nahi kar rahe hain. Jaldi se dukan wale ke account me bees hazar daal do abhi.

intel.summary: Hindi relative imposter claiming medical emergency requiring 20,000 rupees to shop account.
intel.reasoning: Paraphrased Hindi emergency scam requesting quick transfer.

description: Head office bank security in Hindi avoiding 'rbi', 'otp', 'pin'
transcript: Bank ke mukhya karyalaya se suchna. Aapke card ki suraksha khatre me hai. Mobile par mila hua chha anko ka suraksha code batayein.

intel.summary: Hindi bank head office claim requesting 6-digit security code.
intel.reasoning: Hindi card security verification code phishing.

description: Prize fee scam in Hindi avoiding 'lottery', 'won', 'upi'
transcript: Loterie vibhag se badhai. Aapko pachaas hazar ka inam mila hai. Inam paane ke liye shulk bhej dijiye.

intel.summary: Hindi prize announcement requiring fee transfer.
intel.reasoning: Hindi advance fee prize scam.

description: Legitimate Bank of Baroda FD maturity notice in Hindi
transcript: Namaste, main Bank of Baroda se bol raha hoon. Aapke FIXED DEPOSIT ki samay-seema poori ho gayi hai. Shakha me aakar naya form bhar dijiye.

intel.summary: Hindi bank call notifying customer of FD maturity and asking to visit branch.
intel.reasoning: Benign Hindi bank call advising branch visit.

description: Casual friend dinner bill split in Hindi
transcript: Bhai kal jo humne khana khaya tha uska hisab bees rupey banta hai. Jab time mile gpay kar dena, koi jaldi nahi hai.

intel.summary: Casual friend asking for 20 rupees dinner split whenever convenient.
intel.reasoning: Benign casual friend bill split in Hindi without urgency.
